title: Alcarràs Composting Plant
description: A composting facility in Alcarràs, Spain, was established by local livestock farmers to transform manure and slurry mixed with park and garden biomass into high-quality organic fertilizer, supporting the circular bioeconomy. The plant processes around 27,000 tonnes of manure annually and plans to expand with a biogas unit to generate electricity and denitrified water for irrigation.
